radiator_upgrade.notes: Radiator sizing and upgrade to provide adequate heat output for each room to reach its target setpoint, with a configurable output overhead margin for headroom, or enables reduced flow temperature while maintaining comfort.

trv.notes: Supply and fit thermostatic radiator valves to existing radiators.

flow_temp_optimization.notes: Engineer visit for balancing, flow temperature reduction and controls tuning.

setpoint_optimization.notes: Controls review and scheduling update to reduce room target temperatures while maintaining minimum comfort.

window_upgrade.notes: Replacement with high-performance glazing; material pricing is read from openings.json.

door_upgrade.notes: Replacement of external doors with insulated units; material pricing is read from openings.json.

wall_insulation_internal_retrofit.notes: Indicative internal wall insulation retrofit cost. Insulation within studs is capped to 100mm; optional additional internal service layer can be enabled for deeper retrofit.

floor_insulation.notes: Indicative suspended floor insulation retrofit (defaulting to rockwool for joist-cavity moisture handling). Recommendation only targets joist cavity insulation and will not add insulation layers below joists.

loft_insulation.notes: Top-up loft insulation supply and fit estimate. Base layer follows joist/cavity depth; additional above-joist insulation can be added up to 500mm.

heating_system_switch.notes: Indicative system-switch capex. Core plant install uses a size-based model (base + per-kW) with minimum kW and sizing factor. Includes optional wet/electric emitter and distribution conversion allowances when switching system type.
